meaning: n.处理,处置,布置,安排,配置,支配
examples: Congress passed a law that regulates the disposal of waste.
Attempts are being made to solve the problem of waste disposal.
Therefore, less money is spent for garbage disposal.
Indeed, Acer is using all the tools at its disposal, including unique partnerships, to set its products apart.
Each season, he has had less talent at his disposal than he did the year before.
